reviews.review_description: Can’t grab/pick up the Battle Ropes on certain exercises.  Other than that it’s a great workout and fun to play. Please fix this glitch. I’ve tried powering down my game and playing the next day.  Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hey @Chocolatatai ! All fixed in the ver 1.1.4! 
Apologies for this. We missed a very annoying bug when we added hand tracking to the app =( All is great and working now! Enjoy Sam's Battle Ropes =)

reviews.review_description: I can't get the app sorted as it asks for Bluetooth and location settings which I've allowed but still not working if anyone can help that would be great 👍.

developer_response.body:
Hi Flynn. Apologies for this! Currently, EIR Training requires the following permissions to function:
1. Precise Location & 
2. Find Nearby Devices

To update these, please go to Settings > Privacy & Safety > App Permissions > 
1. Location > EIR Training > Precise
2. Nearby devices > EIR Training > allow

This should do the trick! I hope you'll enjoy the app.
We will update the user notification to clarify this on the next patch - the new patch has the description & a video of how to do this

Thanks,
Valkyrie team

reviews.review_description: This is a very well done workout app and it's completely free! The trainer, graphics, visuals, and workouts are perfect. It's like having a personal trainer and home gym in my room!

It feels good to have a human trainer working out together with you, rather than an animated character or worse, an AI character.  The workouts are pretty intensive.  Love the visual board on the right so I know what to expect next.  Hopefully there will be hand tracking in the future, so real dumbbells can be used.

Simple to follow along & effective to burn calories quickly.

My only personal qualm, I have an injured knee and couldn't do some of the workouts, while I loved the other workouts in the mix. I wish there was an option to select one type of workout and just do that for a specified time, maybe as part of workout demos.

This is an up and coming app to keep your eyes on!!!  I joined a challenge in the fitness app and got to look around, sweat and got my heart rate up!  I love that there is a top score that is personalized to YOU - and a leaderboard.  So you are always competing against yourself to better YOUR score!  Can't wait to see more classes come out!  Love the battle ropes and dumbbells!!  Love how the squats are calculated also!  Must try if you are looking for a great workout app!!!

reviews.review_title: Great app. Got me properly sweating.
reviews.review_description: The app is beautiful and does a great job of motivating you to get your workout done. Love the battle ropes and dumbells,  really feels like I'm using them.
I like that this app provides new workouts not found in other apps

I limited access without the band is ok so far.  The required bands are not available until spring of 2023.  Not sure if I will stick with it yet.
Updated: I added 1 star since they removed the exercise that included the bands
Very satisfying app, punching the bubbles on the Box Fit class was fun and made me quite sweaty (which I guess is the point for a fitness app!).
Very good hiit style workout. Would be killer with the haptic band to simulate weight training. Definitely worth a try!

reviews.review_title: Exactly what VR fitness should be
reviews.review_description: In my opinion this app does exactly what fitness apps in VR/MR should do - giving you access to high quality PTs, and using the technology to monitor and track your performance so you have an enhanced experience that can be done anywhere. Also the graphics are great, even the knurling on the dumbbells look realistic, despite the environment being futuristic.
